tools.name: describe_catalog
tools.description: Free discovery: symbols, timeframes, ranges, pricing, quality legend.

tools.name: get_bars
tools.description: Quality-flagged OHLCV candles. Priced per 1,000 candles.

tools.name: get_features
tools.description: Documented leakage-safe feature matrix rows. Priced per call.

tools.name: build_bundle
tools.description: Signed URL for a dataset SKU. Packs: crypto|equities ($59 each), everything ($149: both packs + all token sequences, $730 list), tokens ($18/symbol), dataset (per-symbol OHLCV, crypto $14 / equity $5), mtf (aligned multi-timeframe bundle $9, crypto only), features (feature matrix, crypto $7 / equity

tools.name: get_regime_label
tools.description: Descriptive market-state label (trend/range × calm/vol quadrant) for the most recent completed bar at or before a timestamp. Not a prediction.

tools.name: get_funding
tools.description: Perp funding-rate settlement history from listing date (checksummed archive).

tools.name: get_open_interest
tools.description: Hourly open interest with per-row quality flags (verified archive + flagged bridge).

tools.name: get_context
tools.description: Context series: fear_greed_1d, VIX_1d, DXY_1d, TNX_1d, DJI_1d.

tools.name: get_events
tools.description: Curated macro/crypto events (FOMC w/ surprise, halvings, incidents) in a range.

tools.name: get_orderflow
tools.description: Taker buy/sell imbalance, trade counts, quote volume (1h/1d via API; denser tiers in packs). buy_ratio 0.5 = balanced.

tools.name: validate_backtest_data
tools.description: Quality report for a dataset spec before you backtest on it: coverage, per-bar quality distribution, gaps, and concrete warnings.

tools.name: audit_my_data
tools.description: FREE: submit YOUR OHLCV bars and get an accuracy verdict against the verified archive — score, worst windows, systematic-offset findings. Tells you what's wrong, not the corrected values (that's get_bars).

tools.name: lookahead_check
tools.description: FREE: submit backtest signals ({t, price}) and get an execution-feasibility verdict — impossible fills outside the bar's traded range, fills pinned at bar extremes (classic lookahead bias).

tools.name: survivorship_check
tools.description: FREE: submit a backtest universe + window and get a survivorship-bias verdict — which of your symbols died mid-window, and which delisted symbols we cover that your universe omits.

tools.name: get_fundamentals
tools.description: Point-in-time SEC XBRL fundamentals (80 filers, incl. delisted): every restatement vintage with its filed date. Pass as_of for what was knowable then. Filter by concept (e.g. Assets, Revenues).

tools.name: get_insider
tools.description: SEC Form 4 insider transactions as filed (80 symbols, since 2016): officer/director trades with shares, price, post-trade holdings.

tools.name: get_institutional
tools.description: Quarterly 13F institutional aggregates (81 symbols): holders, shares, value + QoQ deltas from SEC DERA structured tables.

tools.name: get_funding_spread
tools.description: Hourly CEX-vs-DEX funding spread (67 symbols): Hyperliquid funding vs Binance 1h-equivalent, from HL genesis 2023-05.

tools.name: get_market_pulse
tools.description: FREE daily pulse across the catalog: regime flips, funding extremes, CEX-vs-DEX spread extremes, biggest daily moves. One day of values — the history behind each number is the priced product.

tools.name: get_whats_new
tools.description: FREE: what the daily refresh changed — dataset windows extended vs ~7 days ago, new symbols and sections, freshness per asset class.

tools.name: get_quality_receipts
tools.description: FREE public scoreboard: last 30 daily fresh-data audits (cross-venue in-band vs Coinbase, 1m->1h rebuild exactness, depth sanity) — failures included, not hidden.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: build_bundle, get_insider · Private data: build_bundle · Public sink: audit_my_data, lookahead_check, survivorship_check, get_insider.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: build_bundle, get_insider · Private data: build_bundle · Public sink: audit_my_data, lookahead_check, survivorship_check, get_insider

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
